name: Guinness Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the cream cheese, vanilla extract, sugar, and Guinness.
2. Add the cinnamon and mix until well combined.
3. Gradually add flour to thicken the mixture as needed.
4. Fold in 2 eggs until fully incorporated.
5. Pour the batter into a vanilla wafer crust or a springform pan (a springform pan will allow for easier removal later).
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 40 minutes, or until set.
7. Allow to cool before serving.
The cheesecake should have a pale tan color and can be decorated with chocolate ganache if desired.
